-  CWErr.cwpcoTransitionTimeNotSupportedErr 

Case# CWErr.cwpcoTransitionTimeNotSupportedErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwpcoTransitionTimeNotSupportedErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwpcotransitiontimenotsupportederr#Discussion)

Association was denied because the requesting station does not support the PCO transition time required by the AP.
